articles.title: Verstappen coy on Red Bull's Barcelona chances
articles.summary: Red Bull duo Max Verstappen and Isack Hadjar believe "there are still so many unknowns for us" ahead of this weekend's Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, despite a recent improvement in performance.

articles.title: Norris seeking ‘reassurances and confidence’ in Barcelona
articles.summary: Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri have outlined their objectives for this weekend’s Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix.

articles.title: Russell explains mindset going into Barcelona weekend
articles.summary: George Russell has explained how he is simply hoping for “normality” at this weekend’s Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix, amid an up-and-down start to the 2026 season.

articles.title: Leclerc shares update on brakes issue after Monaco retirement
articles.summary: A few days on from his dramatic retirement at his home race in Monaco, Charles Leclerc has shared an insight into how he is feeling about what happened.

articles.title: Every F1 driver’s national team at the FIFA World Cup
articles.summary: We have drivers from all over the world on the F1 grid, but how many of their national teams are competing at the 2026 FIFA World Cup?

articles.title: How Alonso's hunger for success still burns strong
articles.summary: Fernando Alonso first tasted victory on home soil 20 years ago. Now at Aston Martin his drive to succeed is as strong as it ever was.

articles.title: Pirelli to remain exclusive F1 tyre supplier until 2028
articles.summary: Pirelli will remain the single tyre supplier for the FIA Formula One World Championship until 2028, after the FIA exercised the option to extend the current contract by mutual agreement with Formula 1 and Pirelli.

articles.title: Antonelli names 'big factor' in his performances so far
articles.summary: Kimi Antonelli admits that "this year so far [I'm] not doubting myself", as the Mercedes driver heads to the Barcelona-Catalunya Grand Prix on the crest of a wave after five wins on the bounce.

articles.title: Why F1 drivers are excited about the start of the World Cup
articles.summary: Plenty of people within F1 are excited about the start of the 2026 World Cup, and the drivers are no different..
